message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLClassDiagram fontName "Helvetica"

title PB-158 UC8 SQD: Get campaigns customer is eligible for

actor Next Customer
interface P&O (Core Next)
interface Core Bradesco
database P&O DB

rectangle Next Platform
    database P&O DB
    interface P&O (Core Next)
    interface Core Bradesco
end rectangle

rectangle Endpoint
    title Endpoint: GET /campaigns
    section Current implementation
        Currently only called by system management, returns a list of all campaigns with the option to specify:
        - NAME
        - PARTNER_ID
        - OFFER_ID
    section Required implementation
        Either through extension of existing API or new, enable the user to call the endpoint. When a user calls the endpoint return a list of campaigns that the user is eligible for. As part of the request, include an optional field for whether or not to return the offer logo.
    section As part of the CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL response include:
        - Campaign logo version number
        - Campaign logo (optional)
    section ENSURE BACKWARDS COMPATIBILITY IS MAINTAINED
end rectangle

rectangle filter on {NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}
    section 1 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})
    section 2 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})
    section 3 Read campaigns user is eligible for
        Note: Read P&O tables:
        - ELLIGIBLE_USER
        - CAMPAIGN
    section 4 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)
end rectangle

rectangle if user has been or is eligible for at least one campaign
    section 5 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)
end rectangle

rectangle if user is not eligible for any active campaigns
    section 6 Return error (MESSAGE)
end rectangle

Next Customer ..> P&O (Core Next) : 1 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})

Next Platform ..> P&O (Core Next) : 2 Get campaigns user is eligible for ({NAME}, {PARTNER_ID}, {ACTIVE}, {OFFER_ID}, {INCLUDE_LOGO})

Next Platform ..> P&O DB : 3 Read campaigns user is eligible for

Next Platform ..> P&O (Core Next) : 4 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)

Next Platform ..> Next Customer : 5 Return campaigns user is eligible for (CAMPAIGN_RETRIEVAL)

Next Platform ..> Next Customer : 6 Return error (MESSAGE)

@enduml
